summary: Tested Family Tree HTML/CSS component on BeneficiariesPage and Admin Users Graph view. All 6 features verified: (1) Family Tree renders with benefactor gold node at top and beneficiary blue nodes branching below with connecting lines, (2) Clicking beneficiary tree node opens edit SlidePanel, (3) Desktop layout shows tree-left (636px) and tiles-right (955px) grid, (4) Mobile shows single-column stacked layout (358px), (5) Admin Graph view renders 55 HTML/CSS family trees per estate, (6) Toggle button cycles Tree -> Graph -> List correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FamilyTree.js: Clean HTML/CSS implementation using flexbox for tree structure, no SVG
FamilyTree.js: TreeNode component with proper data-testid attributes for automation
FamilyTree.js: Gold (#d4af37) for benefactor, blue (#60A5FA) for beneficiaries as specified
BeneficiariesPage.js: Grid layout lg:grid-cols-[minmax(280px,2fr)_3fr] correctly renders tree-left tiles-right on desktop
UsersTab.js: renderGraphView() uses HTML/CSS divs with flexbox, only SVGs are Lucide icons in estate headers
UsersTab.js: Toggle cycles viewMode 'tree' -> 'graph' -> 'list' with correct button label updates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Family Tree features fully verified. BeneficiariesPage shows HTML/CSS tree with benefactor gold node, beneficiary blue nodes, vertical/horizontal connecting lines. Desktop grid is 2-column (tree 2fr min 280px, tiles 3fr). Mobile is single column stacked. Admin Graph view shows 55 estate cards with HTML/CSS trees (Lucide icon SVGs in headers only, not for tree visualization). Toggle button data-testid='toggle-tree-view' cycles through Tree/Graph/List modes.

verified_features.family_tree_html_css_structure: WORKING - Uses divs with flexbox, not SVG for tree
verified_features.beneficiary_nodes_branching: WORKING - Blue nodes below with vertical drop lines, age display
verified_features.beneficiary_estates_blue_nodes: WORKING - Code supports blue nodes for estates where user is beneficiary
verified_features.desktop_two_column_layout: WORKING - Grid 636px + 955px = tree left, tiles right
verified_features.mobile_stacked_layout: WORKING - Single column 358px, tree above tiles
verified_features.admin_graph_view_html_css: WORKING - 55 estate cards with flexbox tree structure
verified_features.admin_toggle_tree_graph_list: WORKING - Cycles correctly with label updates
verified_features.graph_estate_benefactor_top: WORKING - Gold circle at center with connecting lines to children
verified_features.graph_estate_beneficiaries_below: WORKING - Sorted by age, smaller nodes with drop lines
